aws.name: SSM Patch Manager configured
aws.expected: Custom patch baselines defined and maintenance windows configured
aws.remediation: Configure SSM Patch Manager with custom patch baselines and maintenance windows.

aws.name: Patch compliance monitored
aws.expected: All managed instances show patch compliance within 30 days of patch release
aws.remediation: Review and remediate patch compliance gaps on managed instances.

aws.name: RDS automatic minor version upgrade enabled
aws.remediation: Enable automatic minor version upgrades on all RDS instances.

azure.name: Azure Update Management configured
azure.expected: Update Management configured with scheduled deployments for all VMs
azure.remediation: Configure Azure Update Management with scheduled update deployments.

azure.name: VM patch assessment enabled
azure.expected: Periodic assessment enabled on all VMs for update visibility
azure.remediation: Enable periodic assessment on VMs via Azure Update Manager.

gcp.name: OS Config patch management configured
gcp.expected: Patch deployments scheduled for all managed instances
gcp.remediation: Configure OS Config patch deployments with recurring schedules.

gcp.name: Container image vulnerability scanning
gcp.expected: Vulnerability scanning enabled on all Artifact Registry repositories
gcp.remediation: Enable vulnerability scanning on Artifact Registry repositories.

3.7.2.manual_guidance: Review maintenance tool inventory and authorization records. Verify that maintenance personnel are vetted, tools are approved and inspected before use, and remote maintenance sessions are logged and monitored.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: tools used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: tools used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: techniques used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: techniques used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: mechanisms used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: mechanisms used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: personnel used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide personnel records: personnel used to conduct system maintenance are controlled.

3.7.3.manual_guidance: Review media sanitization procedures for equipment sent off-site for maintenance. Verify sanitization records exist for all equipment removed from the CUI environment. Confirm procedures align with NIST 800-88 guidelines.
evidence_requests: Media sanitization procedures for off-site maintenance

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: equipment to be removed from organizational spaces for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: equipment to be removed from organizational spaces for off-site maintenance is sanitized of any CUI.

3.7.4.manual_guidance: Review procedures for scanning maintenance and diagnostic media before connection to production systems. Verify anti-malware scans are performed on all maintenance media and results are documented.
evidence_requests: Scan records for diagnostic tools and media
Anti-malware scan configuration for removable media

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: media containing diagnostic and test programs are checked for malicious code before being used in organizational systems that process, store, or transmit CUI.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: media containing diagnostic and test programs are checked for malicious code before being used in organizational systems that process, store, or transmit CUI.

aws.name: Session Manager requires MFA for remote maintenance
aws.expected: IAM policies for SSM StartSession require MFA condition
aws.remediation: Add MFA condition to IAM policies for SSM Session Manager access.

aws.name: VPN connections require MFA
aws.expected: Client VPN endpoints configured with MFA authentication
aws.remediation: Configure Client VPN endpoints with Active Directory or SAML MFA.

azure.name: MFA required for Azure Bastion access
azure.expected: Conditional Access requires MFA for Azure portal and management access
azure.remediation: Configure Conditional Access to require MFA for all Azure management access.

gcp.name: 2SV required for admin console access
gcp.expected: 2-Step Verification enforced for all admin accounts used for maintenance
gcp.remediation: Enforce 2-Step Verification for all accounts with maintenance access.

3.7.6.manual_guidance: Review escort and supervision procedures for maintenance personnel without appropriate access authorization. Verify that session recording, direct observation, or escort policies are enforced for uncleared or third-party maintenance staff.
evidence_requests: Escort and supervision procedures for maintenance
Third-party maintenance agreements with supervision requirements
Session recording configuration for maintenance sessions

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: maintenance personnel without required access authorization are supervised during maintenance activities.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide personnel records: maintenance personnel without required access authorization are supervised during maintenance activities.
